abilities.description: When you synchronize with the unique signature of a location - whether through the environmental data, psychic residue, or mystical entities - roll +heart. On a strong hit, you are tethered. When you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.3ff03b51f620ab26]{Undertake an Expedition} to return, you may roll +spirit or +heart. When you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.edac426b7c23f060]{Finish an Expedition}, take +3 momentum on a hit. The tether is lost if you sync elsewhere. On a weak hit, as above, but the process is harrowing; @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.ff32c523829d6481]{Endure Stress} [-2].
As above, and you may also reroll any dice when you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.3de42d2d3cb78855]{Sojourn} in the tethered place.

When you make any move in the tethered location, you may leverage the signature to gain insight or protection. If you do, reroll any dice, but @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.ff32c523829d6481]{Endure Stress} [-2] as the connection strains you.
